text: There are 3 main routes: progynon depot for injection, progynova for oral/sublingual, and oestrogel for transdermal. In japan you can get the latter 2 from オオサカ堂. Personally I would recommend oestrogel first, then get a blood test after a month or two to see your levels because absorption rate of e2 gel is different from people to people. If your absorption rate is not good then maybe switch to sublingual ev. Also don't forget antiandrogen if you choose not to do injection.
body_text: There are 3 main routes: progynon depot for injection, progynova for oral/sublingual, and oestrogel for transdermal. In japan you can get the latter 2 from オオサカ堂. Personally I would recommend oestrogel first, then get a blood test after a month or two to see your levels because absorption rate of e2 gel is different from people to people. If your absorption rate is not good then maybe switch to sublingual ev. Also don't forget antiandrogen if you choose not to do injection.

退一万步讲，就算「文科生 Vibe Coding 比工科生更有优势」也是不正确的。文科生真的比工科生更擅长写提示词吗？文科生对专业词汇的理解比工科生更强吗？
